name: workflow-kit
description: Workflow plugin for execution workflows and commit-readiness gates.

interface.shortDescription: Execution workflows and commit-readiness gates for larger tasks.
interface.longDescription: Provides workflow skills that help Codex choose the right execution mode for active work and run final commit-readiness gates before a change moves toward commit.
defaultPrompt: Run this feature request end-to-end with autopilot.
Split these independent tasks into safe parallel work and integrate the result.
Take this brief from implementation through verification.
Handle this task autonomously and report the final status.
Check whether this change is commit-ready before I commit it.
